preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.22.0: Comprehensive RSI batch — closes 50+ bugs across 9 audit phases (architecture, onboarding, connections, AI/tools, ecommerce, UX, security, performance, tests/CI). Live anchor: 2026-05-10 — full-codebase production-readiness audit identified critical gaps and v1.22.0 closes every one with regression tests and structural guards. ARCHITECTURE: removed dead pinterest-login/snapchat-login/twitter-login case statements from main.go (retained provider factories for future graduation). amazon_ads tool replaced conditional prefix heuristic with explicit actionMap (products/orders/status/setup/push/insights/kill -> binary actions). Klaviyo platform_login no longer says coming soon — redirects to API-key tile in Connections panel with explicit instructions. BRAND_OPTIONAL_ACTIONS allowlist pruned. oauth.go gained top-of-file routing convention doc (Hard-Won Security Rule 17). SECURITY (Hard-Won Rules 1-19): every OAuth state comparison structurally enforced via subtle.ConstantTimeCompare with build-blocking source-scan test. Worker now ships GDPR-compliant Meta deauthorize webhook, Meta data-deletion webhook (returns spec-correct {url, confirmation_code}), and Stripe deauth webhook (account.application.deauthorized) — all with HMAC-SHA256 verification, constant-time byte compare, fail-closed on missing secrets, and 18 regression tests. Token redaction extended to catch sk-/sk_live_/sk_test_/ghp_/AKIA/xox[bpasr]-/EAA/whsec_/fal_/shpat_ prefixes in both Go logs and JS appendErrorLog/appendActivityLog. Vault GCM tamper detection locked with 3-mode tamper test. New DisconnectPlatform(brand, providerKey) clears all per-provider vault entries with build-time drift-detection scan that fails CI if a future VaultPut call site lands without coverage. Auto-refresh circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive 401s, persists dead-marker across cold start, blocks BFF retries until user reconnects. AI/TOOL BEHAVIOR: SPEND_ACTIONS includes kill and duplicate so destructive verbs always card; READ_ONLY_ACTIONS includes accounts/adgroups/ads for Reddit/LinkedIn list ops. Source-scan walks all 6 multiplexer enums and rejects orphan actions. INTENT_TOOL_TO_ACTION parity test enforces Hard-Won Rule 19 — every costImpact:spend intent tool MUST be mapped or CI fails. New meta_launch_test_batch intent tool with 5-ad blast-radius gate. Spend-firing envelopes carry nextSuggested + errorNextAction breadcrumbs. Klaviyo description includes routing hints (flow-performance vs flow-message-performance vs metric-aggregate). connection_status returns partial for slack expired+bot+!webhook. UX: chip-render hardening — both body and bodyHTML paths route through buildErrorChipDom. Tile clicks add loading class with 10s safety timer. getConnectedPlatforms IPC wrapped in Promise.race with 10s timeout. FIFO toast queue coalesces 3+ pending into (N) Notifications. perfBar shows No ad data — run a campaign instead of empty shimmer. MutationObserver triggers loadArchive() on archive-panel visibility change. dismissEl hardening (hidden + display:none + disabled + aria-disabled + onclick=null). Empty-brand state replaced with Set up your first brand link. PERFORMANCE: archive-scanner ARCHIVE_MAX_DEPTH guard + double-defense (prevents symlink-loop OOM). main.js readdirSync of brands timed via performance.now() with >50ms warning. Fact-binding bridge setup wrapped in setTimeout(0) so it doesnt block window paint (saves 200-400ms). Dashboard platform pulls now parallel via safeGo + wg.Wait() across all 7 platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok, Amazon, LinkedIn, Shopify, Stripe). OAuth pending poll consolidated to single server-aggregated binary call. ONBOARDING (merlin-setup SKILL): brand_activate failures hard-stop setup with friendly error. manifestStatus skipped-no-assets surfaces explicit user warning. End-of-setup spell summary lists all four canonical spells with per-spell check/pause status and reason. Zero-approval contract maintained, under 30s end-to-end. TESTS/CI: 60+ new regression tests added across 14 new files — config_recovery, license_expiry, oauth_e2e_cycle, vault_hmac_tamper, oauth_disconnect (with VaultPut drift-scan), autorefresh_circuit, log_redaction (Go + JS), webhooks-compliance, disconnect-cycle, mcp-action-go-parity. All 1152 app + 397 landing + 71 wisdom + Go merlin/bootstrapper/facts pass.
whatsNew: GDPR-compliant deauth + data-deletion webhooks for Meta and Stripe (App Review unblocker)
Auto-refresh circuit breaker — bad refresh tokens stop retrying, no more reconnect loops
Cleaner first launch: tile loading states, brand-empty onboarding link, archive auto-refresh on panel open
